target.title: fix(security): enforce private directory mode 0o700 for managed state dirs
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`mkdirSync({recursive: true})` without explicit `mode` inherits umask-derived permissions (775/755 instead of 700). This exposes session transcripts, tool binaries, plugin skills, and settings directories under `~/.openclaw` to group/other users on multi-user systems.

Fixes #92771

## Why This Change Was Made

The project already has ~10 locations that correctly use `mode: 0o700`. However, 12 `mkdirSync` calls in session lifecycle and agent infrastructure did not enforce private permissions. This PR:
- Adds `mode: 0o700` to managed OpenClaw state dir creation (NOT custom/user-configured paths)
- Adds best-effort `chmodSync` repair for **existing** dirs after upgrade (session-manager, settings-manager, tools-manager, plugin-skills)
- Preserves caller-owned custom paths (`session.store`, export targets) — no forced mode

## User Impact

- All managed directories under `~/.openclaw` now consistently created with owner-only permissions (0700)
- **Existing** permissive dirs are repaired on next agent startup (chmod in getDefaultSessionDir, settings-manager, tools-manager, plugin-skills)
- Custom `session.store` paths unchanged
- No config changes required

## Evidence

### Fresh install (umask 0002)
```
修复前：agents/ → 775 ❌  sessions/ → 775 ❌  plugin-skills/ → 775 ❌
修复后：agents/ → 700 ✅  sessions/ → 700 ✅  plugin-skills/ → 700 ✅
```

### Upgrade repair (pre-existing 775 dirs)
After amendment (ef1adecec5): chmodSync repair added to `getDefaultSessionDir`, `settings-manager.withLock`, `tools-manager`, `plugin-skills`. Existing 775 dirs are repaired to 700 on next access — no manual migration needed.

### Custom path preservation
- `store.ts:858` (`saveSessionStoreUnlocked`): reverted — respects caller-configured `session.store` paths
- `json-files.ts:105` (`writeTextAtomic`): reverted — `dirMode` default unchanged, avoids broad compatibility impact

### Screenshots
| Before fix | After fix |
|---|---|
| ![reproduction](reproduction-evidence) | ![fix-verified](fix-verified) |

### Tests
- `src/config/sessions/sessions.test.ts` — 46 tests ✅
- `src/config/sessions/paths.test.ts` — 16 tests ✅
- Build ✅

| Files changed | +/− |
|---|---|
| 9 files | +40 / −14 |

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
